# `/setworldspawn` Command
Sets the world spawn.

<table>
  <tr>
    <th>Permission Level</th>
    <td>Game Directors</td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
    <th>Requires Cheats?</th>
    <td>Yes</td>
  </tr>
</table>

## Usage
### `/setworldspawn [spawnPoint: x y z]`

## Arguments
- `spawnPoint: x y z`: position
